MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Set For Trial On Oct-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CALCRAFT CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT JOHN BERTOLDI, INCORPORATED'S ANSWER is sustained with 30 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
